programmes.show_name: Made by Machine: When AI Met the Archive
programmes.show_description: Dr Hannah Fry and a virtual host present a new way of making television. Contains some strong language and some upsetting scenes.

programmes.show_name: Canals: The Making of a Nation

programmes.show_name: Horizon: Dawn of the Driverless Car
programmes.show_description: Horizon explores the artificial intelligence required to replace human drivers and explores the implications of a driverless world. First broadcast in 2017.

programmes.show_name: Mark Lawson Talks to Stephen King
programmes.show_description: Master of horror writing Stephen King talks to Mark Lawson about his book Lisey's Story and discusses the inspiration for his novels and how he battled with his own demons.
